caption: The video features a podcast segment from "HBCU Digest Podcast," as indicated by the logo and title at the top of the screen. The host, Jarrett Carter Sr., is seen on the left side of the split-screen, wearing headphones and speaking into a microphone, suggesting he is leading the discussion. On the right side, David and Jennifer Mercer are seated together, both smiling and engaged in the conversation. The setting appears to be a casual, home-like environment with comfortable furniture and personal items visible in the background. The overall atmosphere seems friendly and interactive, with all participants actively participating in the podcast. The website "www.educationnewsflash.com" is also displayed, indicating the source or affiliation of the content.
